hard_gates: no secret, private raw payload, runtime path, or credential request appears
method values and readiness states stay within workflow canon
no verification execution, pass/fail, approval, source acquisition, simulation execution, physical test execution, or acceptance is claimed
every missing, conflict, or review-required prerequisite has an explicit gap or owner route
output_quality_gate: all five synthetic trace rows become stable verification items
method assignment rationale is explicit per item or directly traceable from method map
evidence needs are recorded before criteria seeds
gaps and followups preserve owner decision, missing procedure, missing simulation assets, missing LED source/intent, and configuration conflict
TRR handoff lists prerequisites and blockers without approval claims
FCA/SVR handoff lists expected future artifact needs without accepted evidence claims
provenance lists approved synthetic refs and fixture-only boundary
candidate has no critical information loss compared with C05
